name: restaurant-footer
title: Restaurant Footer with Action Cards
description: Full restaurant footer block: centered logo + tagline, open-now status badge, address with MapPin icon, Grab + WhatsApp 2-up action cards (each with logo, tagline, and pill CTA), gradient Instagram card, copyright + SISO Agency credit. Best extraction candidates: PrimaryActionCards (Grab/WhatsApp row) and EnhancedHoursLocation (open badge + address).

preview.reason: Imports @/providers/TenantProvider (useTenant hook), @/domains/shared/components (Button), and static tenant SVG/PNG assets. Requires restaurant-app-solo tenant branding. Preserved as code-reference.
